claim_bullets.bullet_text: Functional iterator pattern separates traversal from operation (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.167-168).
ArraySum definition focuses on summing, not traversing (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.167-168).
foldArrayWith function only sums arrays (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.167-168).
foldArrayWith function can be used with const foldArray (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.167-168).

source_record_text: This chapter explores the concept of functional iterators and how to separate the mechanism of traversing data structures from the operations performed on them.
